nasb.text: The captain of the bodyguard put Joseph in charge of them, and he took care of them; and they were in confinement for some time.

esv.text: The captain of the guard appointed Joseph to be with them, and he attended them. They continued for some time in custody.

cnv.text: 軍長把他們交給約瑟，約瑟就侍候他們。他們在監房裡過了好些日子。

ccb.text: 护卫长派约瑟去伺候他们。他们在监里待了一段日子。

csbs.text: 护卫长指派约瑟与他们在一起，约瑟就侍候他们；他们在牢里过了一些日子。
